case_title: ETAN SOLARZ ET AL VS. CHRIS ROJAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY SOLARZ, ETAN GUZMAN, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO NEW PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-21-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTFF JONATHAN GUZMAN WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT. PREVIOUS PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON MAY 12, 2105 WAS DEFECTIVE, PLAINTIFFS TO RE-SERVE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
